position_sizing_rule: Enter 40% of available capital; if RSI drops below 22, add 60% of remaining available capital
session_filters: exclude final 25 minutes of trading session

explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume 40% of available capital at first entry, and 60% of remaining available capital when RSI drops below 22.
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Position size would differ, affecting risk and return.
Exit timing could be earlier or later, altering trade duration.

explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume last 25 minutes before market close.
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Trade entry restrictions could be more or less restrictive.

explicit_ambiguities.ambiguity: Interpretation of RSI thresholds (cross vs. level).
explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume cross below 28 triggers entry, cross above 52 triggers exit.
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Trigger timing could shift, affecting trade count and performance.
